compiled_state.title: As an agent, I can find sub-agent definitions locally when the marketplace plugin is not installed
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add a directive to CLAUDE.md instructing agents that when a named sub-agent is unavailable, the agent definition can be found as a markdown prompt file in plugins/dso/agents/ and read inline as a prompt fallback.
**Why**: When the marketplace plugin is not installed, named sub-agents (dispatched via subagent_type) are unavailable. The CLAUDE.md directive gives agents a hint where to find the agent definition markdown so they can read it as a prompt and dispatch a general-purpose agent with those instructions instead.
**Scope**:
- IN: Add directive to CLAUDE.md; document the plugins/dso/agents/ directory structure and naming convention
- OUT: Modifying agent definitions under plugins/dso/agents/ — those files are unchanged. Modifying the Agent tool behavior — this is a prompt-level hint, not a code change.

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md contains a directive that instructs agents to look for sub-agent definitions in plugins/dso/agents/ when a named sub-agent is unavailable, and to read the markdown file inline as a prompt fallback
  ← Satisfies: "CLAUDE.md includes a directive instructing agents that when a named sub-agent is unavailable, the agent definition can be found as a markdown prompt file in plugins/dso/agents/"
- When this story is complete, the directive specifies the exact directory path and the naming convention (e.g., <agent-name>.md maps to subagent_type dso:<agent-name>)
  ← Satisfies: SC8 detail requirement

## Considerations

- [Scenario] Sub-agents in worktree sessions should use REPO_ROOT-relative paths via git rev-parse --show-toplevel

comments.body: Consideration: [Consumer Impact] discover-agents.sh reads agent-routing.conf, not CLAUDE.md. The CLAUDE.md directive only affects Claude's behavior (prompt-level). Clarify whether discover-agents.sh also needs a local-file fallback path when the marketplace plugin is unavailable, or whether the shim self-detection (story 5d45-de9b) already covers discover-agents.sh's needs via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
